raw_consumer_statement:
XX/XX/XXXX I signed up for a citi-card credit card through the Home Depot to get a discount on a microwave and refrigerator that I bought and never used the card again. XX/XX/XXXX received a fraud alert email from Home Depot asking if I recognize a charge to which I answered NO. XX/XX/XXXX I received an email with a bill for {$4500.00}. I called Home Depot and Citibank trying to get this fraud cleared up and canceled the credit card. I also logged into XXXX, XXXX and others to freeze my credit report. They asked that I send a copy of my driver 's license and case number to them, which I did. They created a case number and started an investigation. XXXX XXXX : XXXX. I called a few months later to see the progress and was told that the investigation had closed. I called the police and was told to create an identity theft report, which I did. ( # XXXX ) I just received a letter stating that the investigation had been closed again and they determined that I was responsible for the {$4500.00}. 
The items they say I purchased include a riding lawn mower, XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX bags, XXXX fl XXXX Splash-Less Regular Concentrated Disinfecting Liquid Bleach, Soap Scum Remover, Wifi Pellet Grill and Smoker, Countertop Microwave, and a few other items. I am a XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  woman living in a small house and would never need any of the items associated with this purchase. I am unwilling to pay for these products that I did not purchase. I can't afford to and wouldn't want to if I could.
